# 3D3D Produced Assets

## What Was Generated
These are actual rendered assets, not prompts. All files were generated from repo-local 3D3D photography using `assets/generate_assets.py`.

## Generator
- Script: `assets/generate_assets.py`
- Output folder: `assets/generated/`
- Re-run command:

```bash
python3 "/home/wess/3d3d-platform/assets/generate_assets.py"
```

## Generated Files

### Social posts
- `assets/generated/social-discontinued-part-rescue.png`
  - Format: `1080x1350`
  - Use: flagship replacement-part recovery post
  - Message: discontinued part -> rebuilt replacement

- `assets/generated/social-marine-material-warning.png`
  - Format: `1080x1350`
  - Use: marine materials myth-busting post
  - Message: stop printing boat parts in PLA

- `assets/generated/social-no-cad-needed.png`
  - Format: `1080x1350`
  - Use: remote-intake education post
  - Message: broken sample + rough dimensions are enough to start

- `assets/generated/social-quote-checklist.png`
  - Format: `1080x1350`
  - Use: save-and-share quote checklist asset
  - Message: send four photos for a faster quote

- `assets/generated/social-field-deployment.png`
  - Format: `1080x1350`
  - Use: field deployment / route-support post
  - Message: if the problem cannot ship, bring the fabricator

### Paid creative
- `assets/generated/ad-broken-part-start-here.png`
  - Format: `1080x1350`
  - Use: Facebook or Instagram feed ad
  - Message: broken part -> start remote quote

### Stories
- `assets/generated/story-quote-checklist.png`
  - Format: `1080x1920`
  - Use: Instagram or Facebook story
  - Message: four-photo quote checklist

- `assets/generated/story-before-after.png`
  - Format: `1080x1920`
  - Use: before/after proof story
  - Message: one missing part can stop the whole job

### YouTube thumbnails
- `assets/generated/thumb-stop-using-pla.png`
  - Format: `1280x720`
  - Use: marine materials video thumbnail
  - Message: stop using PLA for boat parts

- `assets/generated/thumb-no-cad-needed.png`
  - Format: `1280x720`
  - Use: reverse-engineering video thumbnail
  - Message: no CAD needed

- `assets/generated/thumb-discontinued-rebuilt.png`
  - Format: `1280x720`
  - Use: discontinued-part recovery video thumbnail
  - Message: discontinued -> rebuilt

## Notes
1. The batch uses real workshop and marine photography from `public/media/workshop/` and `public/media/race/` to keep the visuals authentic to 3D3D.
2. The text system follows the existing palette and layout spec from `assets/layouts.md`.
3. None of the generated assets use New Brunswick or local-only positioning. The language now supports remote intake, worldwide shipping, and marine-route demand.
